verses.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
verses.translation_pt: Quando a terra tremer, com seu tremor.

verses.translation: And the earth discharges its burdens
And man says, "What is [wrong] with it
verses.translation_pt: E o homem perguntou: o que houve com ela?

verses.translation: That Day, it will report its news
verses.translation_pt: Naquele dia, ela contará o que viu.

verses.translation: Because your Lord has commanded it
verses.translation_pt: Deus a inspirou a fazer isso.

verses.text: يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَصۡدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشۡتَاتٗا لِّيُرَوۡاْ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
verses.translation: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds
verses.translation_pt: Naquele dia, cada um verá o que fez.

verses.text: فَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيۡرٗا يَرَهُۥ
verses.translation: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it
verses.translation_pt: Quem fizer o bem, mesmo que pequeno, verá.

verses.text: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٖ شَرّٗا يَرَهُۥ
verses.translation: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it
verses.translation_pt: Quem fizer o mal, mesmo que pequeno, verá.
